column1: # ESP32-S3-WROOM-1 N16R8 (16 MB flash). Custom table (RADIO-1b): the default
# single-app ~1 MB partition is too small once esp_http_client + esp-tls + the
# mbedtls certificate bundle (and the RADIO-2 decoders) are linked. Generous
# 6 MB app + a larger NVS for WiFi creds and the ≥32 station presets (RADIO-1c).
